title: cereus oxygonus
intro: Cereus oxygonus, also known as the Night-blooming Cereus or Queen of the Night, is a species of cactus that is native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to stimulate digestion, reduce inflammation, and relieve pain. The health benefits of Cereus oxygonus include its potential to lower blood sugar levels, improve cardiovascular health, and reduce symptoms of anxiety and depression. In herbal preparations, Cereus oxygonus can be used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, as well as being incorporated into ointments and salves to take advantage of its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties.
